text: when creating aims: show the supported aims with a weight field each (input in %, then calculate the actual weight based on the other supporting aims and loop weight of the supported aim)

status.comment: Reconciliation 2026-05-31: only the RAW weight field was built (AimCreationModal.vue:303 'Weight:' NumericTextInput). The specified %-input + loopWeight-aware weight calculation was NOT implemented — no percentage UI, no shareToWeight conversion anywhere. Superseded by the new connection contribution-% + explanation modal aim, which implements the %/loopWeight logic properly and extends it to the graph drag flows.
